title: Anime angel
description: Adds a beautiful, spawnable Anime Angel to your world! Tame them with a Golden Apple as a loyal companion, or defeat them to obtain an Enchanted Golden Apple.
body:
![Anime angel1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5ecdadc26d4a2216ec83a070e6989bd1c6676e8.png)

💫 Anime Angel by Anoosh 💫  
Bring a touch of divine beauty and anime aesthetics to your Minecraft world! **Anime Angel by Anoosh** introduces a majestic, glowing celestial entity that naturally spawns throughout your world. Whether you seek a loyal companion or a high-risk, high-reward challenge, this angel will completely change your survival experience.

---

✨ Features ✨  
🪽 **Natural Spawning:** Anime Angels appear naturally across the overworld in **Plains**, **Forest**, **Flower Forest**, and **Meadow** biomes. They spawn in two variants — the classic **Anime Angel** and the fiery **Flame Variant** — adding a magical, fantasy atmosphere to your gameplay.  

🍎 **Golden Bond:** Defeating an Anime Angel rewards you with a **Golden Apple**. Use that same Golden Apple to **tame her** and turn her into your loyal celestial ally who fights by your side.  

🎶 **Rhythmic Dancing:** Place a jukebox nearby and play a music disc — if the Anime Angel is close enough, she will start dancing for **820 Minecraft ticks**, bringing life, motion, and style to your base.  

⚔️ **Dynamic Animations:** Includes smooth **walking**, **idle**, **attack**, and **dance** animations powered by GeckoLib, delivering a fluid, anime-inspired experience.  

🌈 **Stylized Visuals:** Beautifully crafted 3D pixel-art model with glowing details, angelic wings, and a distinct visual identity for both the normal and flame variants.

---

🛠️ Installation & Support 🛠️  
1️⃣ Download and install the required library mod (see Requirements below).  
2️⃣ Download the correct version of **Anime Angel by Anoosh** for your Mod Loader (Forge/Fabric/NeoForge).  
3️⃣ Drop both `.jar` files into your Minecraft `mods` folder.  
4️⃣ Launch the game and explore the overworld to encounter your first Anime Angel!

---

⛔ Requirements (🚨 VERY IMPORTANT 🚨) ⛔  
To ensure the models and animations for Anime Angel work properly and do not cause crashes, you **must** install the following dependency:

- [GeckoLib on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)  
- [GeckoLib on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)  

Make sure you download the version of GeckoLib that **exactly matches** your Minecraft version and mod loader.
